description.unified: Unleashes an attack that bounces 4 times starting from the nearest enemy, dealing Magic Damage to each enemy hit. Damage increases by up to 100% the farther the enemy is.
Deals Magic Damage 2 time(s) to a random enemy and surrounding enemies, and stuns them for [1sec -> 1.8 sec]. Damage increases by up to 200% the farther the enemy is.

Deals Magic Damage 6 time(s) to enemies within range, knocks them back for [1.5sec -> 1.8 sec], and reduces their Critical Chance by [60% for 4sec -> 100% for 7 sec]. Damage increases by up to 150% the farther the enemy is.

Attacks the farthest enemy, dealing Magic Damage, knocking them back for [1sec -> 1.2 sec], and increasing Magic Damage taken by 20% for 6 sec. Damage increases by up to 200% the farther the enemy is.

light.unified: [ (removed) Damage increases by 50% -> Ignores the target’s Block effects].

dark.unified: Stuns enemies hit for [1 sec -> 1.2 seconds].

light.unified: [ (removed) Damage increases by 50% -> For 7 seconds, reduces Accuracy of enemies hit by 200].

dark.unified: [ (removed) Reduces ACC of hit enemies by 500 for 4 sec -> If there is only 1 enemy, damage dealt is increased by 100%].

description.unified: [Twinkle Twinkle] The [ (removed) M.Crit Resist by {0} -> Crit Chance Reduction] effect becomes irremovable, and [ (removed) this reduction becomes irremovable -> increases the duration by {0} sec].

dark.unified: Damage dealt to non-hero enemies is increased by [15% -> 30%], and damage taken is reduced by [15% -> 30%].
